name: Cluster Health — Actionable Report + Self-Generating Remediation Sub-Flow
description: Pulls Kubernetes cluster status (live MCP), Prometheus service health, and Loki errors for the configured time window; runs three specialist agents (cloud_operations, engineering_metrics, flows_expert) to synthesize an actionable JSON report with P0/P1/P2 recommendations and a proposed remediation sub-flow JSON. Posts the summary to your chosen channel: Slack / Email / Teams.

meta.purpose: Produce a complete, actionable cluster-health digest for an on-call SRE — combining live Kubernetes state, Prometheus service health, and Loki error logs — and emit a remediation sub-flow that can be saved and run.
how_it_works: 1. Fan out from the manual trigger to three live MCP queries: k8s_cluster_health, prometheus_health_summary, loki_search_errors (uses your user OBO chain).
2. Two specialist agents analyze in parallel: cloud_operations on the k8s snapshot, engineering_metrics on prom+loki output.
3. A REST data_source_query against your configured 'httpbin-proof' (or any rest_api) acts as an external healthcheck probe.
4. prompt_template builds a structured synthesis message; flows_expert agent writes the final {summary, findings, recommendations, proposed_flow} JSON.
5. structured_output validates the JSON shape; webhook_response renders an HTML artifact (saved to the Artifacts library) including the proposed remediation sub-flow definition.
6. A switch node routes to your chosen notification target — slack_message (#devops via webhook), send_email (your test inbox), or teams_message (webhook URL).
meta.expected_output: An HTML artifact persisted to the Artifacts library containing: 1-3 sentence executive summary, prioritized findings, ranked recommendations with rationale, and a copy-pastable sub-flow JSON for remediation. Plus a real notification delivered to Slack / Email / Teams.
meta.useful_when: Run on a schedule as a morning digest, on-demand during an incident, or as a sanity check after any production rollout. Drop the notification_target on the trigger to switch channels per run.
configuration_required: Workspace credential: SLACK_DEVOPS_WEBHOOK (or override webhook URL via trigger input)
Optional Teams webhook URL via trigger input
Email destination via trigger input (default: trent@openagentic.io)
A REST data source named 'httpbin-proof' or your own rest_api data source — paste its id into the trigger input

data.prompt:
Extract the JSON report from this synthesizer output:

{{steps.agent_synth.content}}

data.bodyTemplate:
Cluster Health Capstone — {{trigger.namespace}} / {{trigger.time_window}}

Summary: {{steps.structured.output.summary}}

Findings

{{steps.structured.output.findings}}

Recommendations

{{steps.structured.output.recommendations}}

Proposed Remediation Sub-Flow

{{steps.structured.output.proposed_flow.name}}

{{steps.structured.output.proposed_flow.definition}}

Copy the JSON above into 'New Workflow → Import JSON' to save the remediation flow.

data.subject: Cluster Health Capstone — {{trigger.namespace}} ({{trigger.time_window}})
